toast.avatarGenerating: Generating multiple avatar styles in background...
toast.needNameAnimal: Please fill in name and animal fields in IDENTITY.md first
toast.needSaveFirst: Please save the agent first before generating avatars
toast.avatarBackground: Generating avatars in background, refresh page later...
toast.applied: Content applied. Please click Save to persist.
toast.upgradeNoId: Cannot upgrade: agent not saved yet (missing ID). Please save first.

editor.dragResize: Drag to resize form and source areas
editor.growthHint: After completing a few tasks, the growth coach will automatically record the trajectory
editor.generateDescNew: Describe what your agent does. AI will generate IDENTITY / AGENTS / SOUL configurations (avatars generated in background).
editor.generateDescEdit: Choose generation scope and describe your agent.
editor.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. A code review expert who identifies bugs, security issues and style problems, providing clear improvement suggestions...
editor.avatarOnlyHint: Will generate 6 style avatars based on the name and animal fields in IDENTITY.md
editor.upgradeConfirmDesc: Sensei will analyze current AGENTS.md and provide an optimized version for comparison. This takes 10–60 seconds, please don't close the page.
editor.overwriteDesc: This will overwrite IDENTITY.md, AGENTS.md and SOUL.md with the generated preview. If name/animal is included, avatar generation will be triggered after save.

sensei.analyzingFull: Sensei is generating IDENTITY / AGENTS / SOUL configurations...
sensei.analyzingSingle: Sensei is analyzing the configuration of "{{name}}"...
sensei.completeNewCheck: Generation complete, please review each tab
sensei.completeCheck: Generation complete, please review changes in each tab
sensei.completePartialError: Generation complete, but {{segments}} segment(s) failed — retry via the top-right button
sensei.completeSuggestions: Analysis complete, here are the optimization suggestions
sensei.completeNoChanges: Analysis complete, the configuration is already good, no changes needed
